title: HCI Verification Workload Configuration
description: Schema for workload.json consumed by target/verif/simvectors/main.py

log_masters.description: Ordered list of LOG masters (CORE, then DMA, then EXT). Length must equal N_CORE + N_DMA + N_EXT in hardware.json.

hwpe_masters.description: Ordered list of HWPE masters. Length must equal N_HWPE in hardware.json.

pattern.description: A single traffic pattern segment. Multiple patterns on the same master are executed sequentially, separated by PAUSE fence tokens in the stimulus file.

description.description: Human-readable label for this pattern segment, shown in the memory-map report.

mem_access_type.description: Access pattern selector. 'matmul' is an alias for 'matmul_phased'.

job.description: Job name for this pattern segment. Used by other patterns' wait_for_jobs to reference this segment.

wait_for_jobs.description: Job names this pattern waits for before starting. Generates a PAUSE fence before this pattern segment and holds the driver until all referenced jobs have advanced past the same fence level.

n_transactions.description: Number of real memory accesses (idles are NOT counted). Mandatory for 'random'. For other patterns can be derived from geometry or from region_size_bytes (transaction-width based).

region_base_address.description: [random, linear, matmul_phased] Base byte address of the memory region.

region_size_bytes.description: [random, linear, matmul_phased] Size in bytes of the memory region. For linear/matmul_phased, if n_transactions is omitted this can be used to derive it from transaction width.

matrix_k.description: [matmul_phased] Columns of A / rows of B.

region_base_address_a.description: [matmul_phased] Base address of the read-A region.

region_size_bytes_a.description: [matmul_phased] Size in bytes of the read-A region.

region_base_address_b.description: [matmul_phased] Base address of the read-B region.

region_size_bytes_b.description: [matmul_phased] Size in bytes of the read-B region.

region_base_address_c.description: [matmul_phased] Base address of the write-C region.

region_size_bytes_c.description: [matmul_phased] Size in bytes of the write-C region.

matmul_ratio_a.description: [matmul_phased] Relative weight of the read-A phase.

matmul_ratio_b.description: [matmul_phased] Relative weight of the read-B phase.

matmul_ratio_c.description: [matmul_phased] Relative weight of the write-C phase.

traffic_pct.description: [random, linear, matmul_phased] Modeled request utilization percentage (adds req=0 idles after each request when <100).

traffic_read_pct.description: [random, linear] Percentage of accesses that are reads (wen=1).

idle_cycles_between_phases.description: [2d, 3d, matmul_phased] Idle cycles inserted at each inner phase boundary.

master.description: Per-master configuration. A master either has a flat single-pattern config or a 'patterns' list for multi-job execution.

id.description: Optional consistency label. Mapping is always positional.

start_delay_cycles.description: Number of idle cycles prepended to the stimulus file before the first pattern.

patterns.description: Ordered list of pattern segments. Executed sequentially; a PAUSE fence token is inserted between each pair of consecutive patterns. The wait_for_jobs of pattern f defines which jobs must have advanced past fence f before this master resumes. If omitted, the master config itself is treated as a single flat pattern.
